shots.title: SCENE 1 OPENER — CAM A WIDE — 06/17/2026, 04:13:00 AM PDT

shots.title: SCENE 2 — CAM B TIGHTER — 06/17/2026, 04:13:00 AM PDT

shots.title: SCENE 4 — CAM B TIGHTER — 06/17/2026, 04:13:00 AM PDT

shots.title: SCENE 5 — CAM B TIGHTER — 06/17/2026, 04:13:00 AM PDT

shots.title: SCENE 6 — CAM A TIGHTER — 06/17/2026, 04:13:00 AM PDT

shots.title: SCENE 7 — CAM B TIGHTER — 06/17/2026, 04:13:00 AM PDT
